output.review: West Tampa Sandwich Shop has excellent Cuban sandwiches at a good price. The food is the real deal, authentic Tampa style. Service can be spotty and the space is no-frills, but you come here for the food, not the ambiance. Order the guava and cheese empanada too!

output.review: Buffalo Exchange is one of those places that takes you back to the good old days of Philly thrift hunting, with an eclectic mix that always promises a surprise. Prices are moderate, and the plus-size selection is a rare find. Like most vintage spots though, you have to dig through the ordinary to uncover the gems.
